factions.name: Iron-Banes
factions.philosophy: The Undying are corrupted processes that must be purged.

factions.name: God-Sleeper Cultists
factions.philosophy: The Jötun-Forged are sleeping gods awaiting the signal to awaken.

factions.name: Jötun-Readers
factions.philosophy: Knowledge is the only path to understanding the Glitch.

factions.name: Rust-Clans
factions.philosophy: Survival first. No ideology, no worship, no grand theories.

factions.name: Independents
factions.philosophy: Factions are chains. We walk our own path.
